age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate in Professional Course
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate in Professional Course Selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE, The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. As per DST office memorandum no. DST/PCPM/Z-06/2022.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Agartala to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Agartala Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Agartala is July 5, 2026. Ensure you apply well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science or a Graduate/Post Graduate degree in a Professional Course. They must also have qualified through national-level eligibility tests like CSIR UGC NET or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000, which includes 10% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at the National Institute of Technology, Agartala.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website of NIT Agartala?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Institute of Technology, Agartala is www.nita.ac.in.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is F.NITA.20 (670-ECE)/2025-26/IRG-ANRF Project/MBS/JRF.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q10. In which state is NIT Agartala located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology, Agartala is located in Agartala, Tripura.
